creator: xmj@FreeBSD.org
text:
port submit used GNATS send-pr(1). Once we have a command line interface to submitting bugs to FreeBSD's bugzilla, I'll happily integrate that.

So far I'm unaware of any CLI in any version including 11.0-CURRENT that can be used to submit bugs.

In my opinion the issue is not that much ports-mgmt/porttools not being able to submit, but FreeBSD users in general not having any tool in base that can be used to submit bugs.

(I may be wrong. In case we *do* have any send-pr-ish tool in base, now would be a good moment to let me know about it ;-)
